channel.title: Me on adoption curve dot net
channel.description: Recent content in Me on adoption curve dot net

item.title: I'm going to talk at Interesting
item.description: [UPDATED: slides from the day and some waffle available here] [![559228171_96c29cc898_m](http://www.adoptioncurve.net/archives/2009/08/im-going-to-talk-at-interesting.php/559228171_96c29cc898_m)[Russell Davies](http://russelldavies.typepad.com)' Interesting “conferences” are about the best value-for-money day out you can find - £20 gets you into a gathering of 350 people at Conway Hall to see 20-odd talks on interesting topics. In the two years it’s been going they’ve ranged from Lego as a cure for global warming, the geophysics of World Of Warcraft, to why horse are scared of crisp packets.

item.title: New Year, new look.
item.description: This blog has been sadly neglected of late, despite the river of pseudo-content that flows into it courtesy of my del.icio.us links. At work, I’m surrounded by people whose blogs are erudite, beautiful to the eye and regularly updated, so over the Christmas downtime I decided to hack away to improve at least one of those factors, and replace what was meant to be a temporary stop-gap template that lasted something like two years.
